positive: A vibrant, stylized depiction of a celestial journey, featuring a group of silhouetted fantastical creatures—a majestic phoenix, a griffin, and a wise owl—flying together against a dramatic, swirling galaxy backdrop. The scene uses a high-contrast palette of deep indigo, radiant gold, electric cyan, and burnt orange. The composition is centered, with the creatures in dynamic flight poses. The style should be a blend of modern vector illustration and Art Deco etching, ensuring clean, bold lines and distinct silhouette separation. Lighting should emphasize rim lighting on the subjects, making them pop against the nebula. Highly detailed, symmetrical composition, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, writing, copyright, sketch, cartoonish, grayscale
